doc_title: Enhancing the General Agent Capabilities of Low-Parameter LLMs through Tuning and Multi-Branch Reasoning

items.fact: The paper references ALFworld (Shridhar et al., 2020).
items.evidence_span: To enhance the task planning capabilities of LLMs, we take ALFworld (Shridhar et al., 2020) as an example to construct data with interactive trajectories.

items.fact: The paper references Operating System, and WebShop (Yao et al., 2022a).
entities: Operating System, and WebShop (Yao et al., 2022a)
items.evidence_span: there are also agent tasks such as Operating System, and WebShop (Yao et al., 2022a) that have fewer dialogue rounds and prioritize the use of external tools.

items.fact: The paper references AgentTuning (Zeng et al., 2023).
items.evidence_span: This is identical to AgentTuning (Zeng et al., 2023).

items.fact: The paper references AgentBench benchmark (Liu et al., 2023)
The paper references agentlm (Zeng et al., 2023)
